headline: Global Supply Shock Reignites Oil Exploration Boom
summary: Major energy firms, including SLB, Baker Hughes, and ExxonMobil say the Middle East supply crisis is pushing governments and companies to prioritize energy security and ramp up oil and gas exploration investment.
